title: BlackBerry Q2 2021 Earnings Preview
text: BlackBerry was scheduled to announce Q2 earnings results on Thursday, September 24, before market open. The consensus EPS Estimate was $0.02 and the consensus Revenue Estimate was $239.74 million, representing 8.1% year-over-year decline. Analysts expected gross margin of 72.1%. Over the last 2 years, BB had beaten EPS estimates 100% of the time and had beaten revenue estimates 63% of the time. Over the last 3 months, EPS estimates had seen 6 upward revisions and 0 downward, while revenue estimates had seen 4 upward revisions and 0 downward.
